formal
statement: bij p {u 0 i|i ∈ p} (λi ⇒ u 0 i);
proof term: exact (god1_injective_family_bijective_onto_image p n (λi ⇒ u 0 i) hU0Inj);
L248603L248604
have hV0BijOwnImage: \({\lambda i,\;v\left(0,i\right)} : {p} \xrightarrow{\sim} {\left\{v\left(0,i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}}\) by injective_family_bijective_onto_image from hV0Inj;
formal
statement: bij p {v 0 i|i ∈ p} (λi ⇒ v 0 i);
proof term: exact (god1_injective_family_bijective_onto_image p n (λi ⇒ v 0 i) hV0Inj);
L248606L248607
have hV0BijImage: \({\lambda i,\;v\left(0,i\right)} : {p} \xrightarrow{\sim} {\left\{u\left(0,i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}}\) by bij_codomain_eq_subst from hImagesEq, hV0BijOwnImage;
formal
statement: bij p {u 0 i|i ∈ p} (λi ⇒ v 0 i);
proof term: exact (god1_bij_codomain_eq_subst p {v 0 i|i ∈ p} {u 0 i|i ∈ p} (eq_sym {u 0 i|i ∈ p} {v 0 i|i ∈ p} hImagesEq) (λi ⇒ v 0 i) hV0BijOwnImage);
L248611L248612
have hImagePower: \({\left\{u\left(0,i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}} \in {\wp {n}}\) by PowerI from hU0Maps;
formal
statement: {u 0 i|i ∈ p} ∈ 𝒫 n;
proof term: exact (PowerI n {u 0 i|i ∈ p} (λy hy ⇒ ReplE_impred p (λi ⇒ u 0 i) y hy (y ∈ n) (λi hi hyi ⇒ mem_eq_substL n (u 0 i) y hyi (hU0Maps i hi))));
L248617L248619
have hU0CopyInImage: \({\lambda i\in p,\;u\left(0,i\right)} \in {{\left\{u\left(0,i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}}^{{p}}}\) by lam_Pi;
formal
statement: (λi ∈ p ⇒ u 0 i) ∈ {u 0 i|i ∈ p}p;
proof term: exact (lam_Pi p (λi ⇒ {u 0 q|q ∈ p}) (λi ⇒ u 0 i) (λi hi ⇒ ReplI p (λq ⇒ u 0 q) i hi));
L248621L248622
have hU0CopyEq: \({\lambda i\in p,\;u\left(0,i\right)} = {u\left(0\right)}\) by Pi_eta from hU0In;
formal
statement: (λi ∈ p ⇒ u 0 i) = u 0;
proof term: exact (Pi_eta p (λi ⇒ n) (u 0) hU0In);
L248623L248624
have hU0InImagePower: \({u\left(0\right)} \in {{\left\{u\left(0,i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}}^{{p}}}\) by substitution from hU0CopyEq, hU0CopyInImage;
formal
statement: u 0 ∈ {u 0 i|i ∈ p}p;
proof term: exact (mem_eq_substL ({u 0 i|i ∈ p}p) (λi ∈ p ⇒ u 0 i) (u 0) (eq_sym (λi ∈ p ⇒ u 0 i) (u 0) hU0CopyEq) hU0CopyInImage);
L248628L248630
have hV0CopyInImage: \({\lambda i\in p,\;v\left(0,i\right)} \in {{\left\{u\left(0,i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}}^{{p}}}\) by lam_Pi from hImagesEq;
formal
statement: (λi ∈ p ⇒ v 0 i) ∈ {u 0 i|i ∈ p}p;
proof term: exact (lam_Pi p (λi ⇒ {u 0 q|q ∈ p}) (λi ⇒ v 0 i) (λi hi ⇒ mem_eq_set_subst {v 0 q|q ∈ p} {u 0 q|q ∈ p} (v 0 i) (eq_sym {u 0 q|q ∈ p} {v 0 q|q ∈ p} hImagesEq) (ReplI p (λq ⇒ v 0 q) i hi)));
L248635L248636
have hV0CopyEq: \({\lambda i\in p,\;v\left(0,i\right)} = {v\left(0\right)}\) by Pi_eta from hV0In;
formal
statement: (λi ∈ p ⇒ v 0 i) = v 0;
proof term: exact (Pi_eta p (λi ⇒ n) (v 0) hV0In);
L248637L248638
have hV0InImagePower: \({v\left(0\right)} \in {{\left\{u\left(0,i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}}^{{p}}}\) by substitution from hV0CopyEq, hV0CopyInImage;
formal
statement: v 0 ∈ {u 0 i|i ∈ p}p;
proof term: exact (mem_eq_substL ({u 0 i|i ∈ p}p) (λi ∈ p ⇒ v 0 i) (v 0) (eq_sym (λi ∈ p ⇒ v 0 i) (v 0) hV0CopyEq) hV0CopyInImage);
L248642L248643
have hU0EqV0: \({u\left(0\right)} = {v\left(0\right)}\) by h_s23_t9_increasing_enumeration_unique from hImagePower, hU0InImagePower, hV0InImagePower, hU0BijImage, hV0BijImage, hU0Increasing, hV0Increasing;
formal
statement: u 0 = v 0;
proof term: exact (h_s23_t9_increasing_enumeration_unique {u 0 i|i ∈ p} hImagePower (u 0) hU0InImagePower (v 0) hV0InImagePower hU0BijImage hV0BijImage hU0Increasing hV0Increasing);
L248647
have hSigmaPointwise: \(\forall h\in p,\;{u\left(1,h\right)} = {v\left(1,h\right)}\);
proof from hU1In, hV1In, hMapPointwise, hU0EqV0, hU0Injective (9 steps)
L248648L248649
let h; assume hh;
L248650L248651
have hU1h: \({u\left(1,h\right)} \in {p}\) by ap_Pi from hU1In, hh;
formal
statement: u 1 h ∈ p;
proof term: exact (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ p) (u 1) h hU1In hh);
L248652L248653
have hV1h: \({v\left(1,h\right)} \in {p}\) by ap_Pi from hV1In, hh;
formal
statement: v 1 h ∈ p;
proof term: exact (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ p) (v 1) h hV1In hh);
L248654L248655
have hSameSortedValues: \({u\left(0,u\left(1,h\right)\right)} = {u\left(0,v\left(1,h\right)\right)}\) by transitivity from hMapPointwise, hh, hU0EqV0;
formal
statement: u 0 (u 1 h) = u 0 (v 1 h);
proof term: exact (eq_i_tra (u 0 (u 1 h)) (v 0 (v 1 h)) (u 0 (v 1 h)) (hMapPointwise h hh) (eq_sym (u 0 (v 1 h)) (v 0 (v 1 h)) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ z (v 1 h)) (u 0) (v 0) hU0EqV0)));
L248660
thus thesis by hU0Injective from hU1h, hV1h, hSameSortedValues;
formal
exact (hU0Injective (u 1 h) hU1h (v 1 h) hV1h hSameSortedValues);
end;
L248662L248663
have hU1EqV1: \({u\left(1\right)} = {v\left(1\right)}\) by extensionality from hU1In, hV1In, hSigmaPointwise;
formal
statement: u 1 = v 1;
proof term: exact (Pi_ext p (λh ⇒ p) (u 1) hU1In (v 1) hV1In hSigmaPointwise);
L248665L248666
have hPairCoordinatesEq: \({\left(u\left(0\right),u\left(1\right)\right)} = {\left(v\left(0\right),v\left(1\right)\right)}\) by transitivity from hU0EqV0, hU1EqV1;
formal
statement: (u 0,u 1) = (v 0,v 1);
proof term: exact (eq_i_tra (u 0,u 1) (v 0,u 1) (v 0,v 1) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ (z,u 1)) (u 0) (v 0) hU0EqV0) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ (v 0,z)) (u 1) (v 1) hU1EqV1));
L248669
thus thesis by transitivity from hu, hPairCoordinatesEq, hv;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra u (u 0,u 1) v (eq_sym (u 0,u 1) u (tuple_Sigma_eta {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (λz ⇒ permutation_group p) u hu)) (eq_i_tra (u 0,u 1) (v 0,v 1) v hPairCoordinatesEq (tuple_Sigma_eta {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (λz ⇒ permutation_group p) v hv)));
end;
L248678
have hTuplePermutationSurjective: \(\forall idx\in \left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid \neg {\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}}}\right\},\;\exists u\in {\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\}} \times {\mathfrak S({p})},\;{\lambda h\in p,\;u\left(0,u\left(1,h\right)\right)} = {idx}\);
proof from h_s23_t9_finite_subset_increasing_enumeration, hn, hp, hTuplePermutationMaps (78 steps)
statement: ∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)}, ∃u ∈ ({idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} ⨯ permutation_group p), (λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) = idx;
L248685L248686
let idx; assume hidxDistinctMember;
L248687L248688
have hidxIn: \({idx} \in {{n}^{{p}}}\) by hidxDistinctMember;
formal
statement: idx ∈ np;
proof term: exact (SepE1 (np) (λz ⇒ not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ z i = z j)) idx hidxDistinctMember);
L248691L248693
have hidxNoCollision: \(\neg {\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}}}\) by hidxDistinctMember;
formal
statement: not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j);
proof term: exact (SepE2 (np) (λz ⇒ not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ z i = z j)) idx hidxDistinctMember);
L248696
have hidxInjective: \(\forall i,j\in p,\;{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)} \to {i} = {j}\);
proof from hidxNoCollision (10 steps)
L248697L248698L248699L248700
let i; assume hi; let j; assume hj, hValues;
L248701
have hDistinctContradiction: \({i} \neq {j} \to {i} = {j}\);
proof from hi, hj, hValues, hidxNoCollision (4 steps)
L248702
assume hij;
L248703L248704
have hForbidden: \(\exists q,k\in p,\;{{q} \neq {k}} \land {{idx\left(q\right)} = {idx\left(k\right)}}\) by witness \(i\) from hi, hj, hij, hValues;
formal
statement: ∃q k ∈ p, q ≠ k ∧ idx q = idx k;
proof term: exact (ex_intro (λq ⇒ q ∈ p ∧ ∃k ∈ p, q ≠ k ∧ idx q = idx k) i (andI (i ∈ p) (∃k ∈ p, i ≠ k ∧ idx i = idx k) hi (ex_intro (λk ⇒ k ∈ p ∧ (i ≠ k ∧ idx i = idx k)) j (andI (j ∈ p) (i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j) hj (andI (i ≠ j) (idx i = idx j) hij hValues)))));
L248714
thus thesis by FalseE from hidxNoCollision, hForbidden;
end;
L248715
thus thesis by orE from hDistinctContradiction;
formal
exact (orE (i = j) (i ≠ j) (xm (i = j)) (i = j) (λh ⇒ h) hDistinctContradiction);
end;
L248717L248718
have hidxMaps: \(\forall i\in p,\;{idx\left(i\right)} \in {n}\) by ap_Pi from hidxIn;
formal
statement: ∀i ∈ p, idx i ∈ n;
proof term: exact (λi hi ⇒ ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ n) idx i hidxIn hi);
L248719L248720
have hidxInj: \({\lambda i,\;idx\left(i\right)} : {p} \hookrightarrow {n}\) by injI from hidxMaps, hidxInjective;
formal
statement: inj p n (λi ⇒ idx i);
proof term: exact (injI p n (λi ⇒ idx i) hidxMaps hidxInjective);
L248721L248722
have hImageBij: \({\lambda i,\;idx\left(i\right)} : {p} \xrightarrow{\sim} {\left\{idx\left(i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}}\) by injective_family_bijective_onto_image from hidxInj;
formal
statement: bij p {idx i|i ∈ p} (λi ⇒ idx i);
proof term: exact (god1_injective_family_bijective_onto_image p n (λi ⇒ idx i) hidxInj);
L248724L248725
have hImagePower: \({\left\{idx\left(i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}} \in {\wp {n}}\) by PowerI from hidxMaps;
formal
statement: {idx i|i ∈ p} ∈ 𝒫 n;
proof term: exact (PowerI n {idx i|i ∈ p} (λy hy ⇒ ReplE_impred p (λi ⇒ idx i) y hy (y ∈ n) (λi hi hyi ⇒ mem_eq_substL n (idx i) y hyi (hidxMaps i hi))));
L248730L248731
have hImageEquipP: \(\mathrm{equip}({\left\{idx\left(i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}},{p})\) by equip_sym from hImageBij;
formal
statement: equip {idx i|i ∈ p} p;
proof term: exact (equip_sym p {idx i|i ∈ p} (ex_intro_setfun (λphi : set → set ⇒ bij p {idx i|i ∈ p} phi) (λi ⇒ idx i) hImageBij));
L248735L248739
have hEnumeration: \(\exists e\in {\left\{idx\left(i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}}^{{p}},\;{{\lambda i,\;\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} : {p} \xrightarrow{\sim} {\left\{idx\left(i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}}} \land {\forall i,j\in p,\;{i} \in {j} \to {\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} \in {\left(e\right)\left(j\right)}}\) by h_s23_t9_finite_subset_increasing_enumeration from hn, hp, hImagePower, hImageEquipP;
formal
statement: ∃e ∈ {idx i|i ∈ p}p, bij p {idx i|i ∈ p} (λi ⇒ e i) ∧ ∀i j ∈ p, i ∈ j → e i ∈ e j;
proof term: exact (h_s23_t9_finite_subset_increasing_enumeration n hn p hp {idx i|i ∈ p} hImagePower hImageEquipP);
L248741
have hBuildFromEnumeration: \(\forall e\in {\left\{idx\left(i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}}^{{p}},\;{{\lambda i,\;\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} : {p} \xrightarrow{\sim} {\left\{idx\left(i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}}} \land {\forall i,j\in p,\;{i} \in {j} \to {\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} \in {\left(e\right)\left(j\right)}} \to \exists u\in {\left\{z\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\}} \times {\mathfrak S({p})},\;{\lambda h\in p,\;u\left(0,u\left(1,h\right)\right)} = {idx}\);
proof from hImagePower, hImageBij, hTuplePermutationMaps, hidxIn (47 steps)
statement: ∀e ∈ {idx i|i ∈ p}p, (bij p {idx i|i ∈ p} (λi ⇒ e i) ∧ ∀i j ∈ p, i ∈ j → e i ∈ e j) → ∃u ∈ ({z ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p z} ⨯ permutation_group p), (λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) = idx;
L248749L248750
let e; assume he, hEData;
L248751L248752
have hEBij: \({\lambda i,\;\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} : {p} \xrightarrow{\sim} {\left\{idx\left(i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}}\) by hEData;
formal
statement: bij p {idx i|i ∈ p} (λi ⇒ e i);
proof term: exact (andEL (bij p {idx i|i ∈ p} (λi ⇒ e i)) (∀i j ∈ p, i ∈ j → e i ∈ e j) hEData);
L248755L248756
have hEIncreasing: \(\forall i,j\in p,\;{i} \in {j} \to {\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} \in {\left(e\right)\left(j\right)}\) by hEData;
formal
statement: ∀i j ∈ p, i ∈ j → e i ∈ e j;
proof term: exact (andER (bij p {idx i|i ∈ p} (λi ⇒ e i)) (∀i j ∈ p, i ∈ j → e i ∈ e j) hEData);
L248759L248760
have hECopyInN: \({\lambda i\in p,\;\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} \in {{n}^{{p}}}\) by bijection_maps_into from hImagePower, hEBij;
formal
statement: (λi ∈ p ⇒ e i) ∈ np;
proof term: exact (lam_Pi p (λi ⇒ n) (λi ⇒ e i) (λi hi ⇒ (PowerE n {idx q|q ∈ p} hImagePower) (e i) (god1_bijection_maps_into p {idx q|q ∈ p} (λq ⇒ e q) hEBij i hi)));
L248764L248765
have hECopyEq: \({\lambda i\in p,\;\left(e\right)\left(i\right)} = {e}\) by Pi_eta from he;
formal
statement: (λi ∈ p ⇒ e i) = e;
proof term: exact (Pi_eta p (λi ⇒ {idx q|q ∈ p}) e he);
L248766L248767
have hEInN: \({e} \in {{n}^{{p}}}\) by substitution from hECopyEq, hECopyInN;
formal
statement: e ∈ np;
proof term: exact (mem_eq_substL (np) (λi ∈ p ⇒ e i) e (eq_sym (λi ∈ p ⇒ e i) e hECopyEq) hECopyInN);
L248773L248775
have hEIncreasingMember: \({e} \in {\left\{z\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\}}\) by set introduction from hEInN, hEIncreasing;
formal
statement: e ∈ {z ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p z};
proof term: exact (SepI (np) (λz ⇒ strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p z) e hEInN hEStrict);
L248778L248780
have hEInverseBij: \({{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}} : {\left\{idx\left(i\right)\mid i\in p\right\}} \xrightarrow{\sim} {p}\) by bij_inv from hEBij;
formal
statement: bij {idx i|i ∈ p} p (inv p (λq ⇒ e q));
proof term: exact (bij_inv p {idx i|i ∈ p} (λq ⇒ e q) hEBij);
L248781L248783
have hRawSigmaBij: \({\lambda h,\;{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({idx\left(h\right)})} : {p} \xrightarrow{\sim} {p}\) by bij_comp from hImageBij, hEInverseBij;
formal
statement: bij p p (λh ⇒ inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (idx h));
proof term: exact (bij_comp p {idx i|i ∈ p} p (λh ⇒ idx h) (inv p (λq ⇒ e q)) hImageBij hEInverseBij);
L248786L248788
have hSigmaIn: \({\lambda h\in p,\;{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({idx\left(h\right)})} \in {{p}^{{p}}}\) by bijection_maps_into from hEInverseBij;
formal
statement: (λh ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (idx h)) ∈ pp;
proof term: exact (lam_Pi p (λh ⇒ p) (λh ⇒ inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (idx h)) (λh hh ⇒ god1_bijection_maps_into {idx i|i ∈ p} p (inv p (λq ⇒ e q)) hEInverseBij (idx h) (ReplI p (λi ⇒ idx i) h hh)));
L248793L248795
have hSigmaBij: \({\lambda h,\;\left(\lambda q\in p,\;{\lambda z,\;\left(e\right)\left(z\right)}^{-1}({idx\left(q\right)})\right)\left(h\right)} : {p} \xrightarrow{\sim} {p}\) by bounded_bijection from hRawSigmaBij;
formal
statement: bij p p (λh ⇒ (λq ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx q)) h);
proof term: exact (god1_bounded_bijection p (λh ⇒ inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (idx h)) hRawSigmaBij);
L248797L248800
have hSigmaPermutation: \({\lambda h\in p,\;{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({idx\left(h\right)})} \in {\mathfrak S({p})}\) by permutation_group_intro from hSigmaIn, hSigmaBij;
formal
statement: (λh ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (idx h)) ∈ permutation_group p;
proof term: exact (god1_permutation_group_intro p (λh ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (idx h)) hSigmaIn hSigmaBij);
L248803L248807
have hPairIn: \({\left(e,\lambda h\in p,\;{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({idx\left(h\right)})\right)} \in {{\left\{z\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\}} \times {\mathfrak S({p})}}\) by tuple_2_setprod from hEIncreasingMember, hSigmaPermutation;
formal
statement: (e,(λh ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (idx h))) ∈ ({z ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p z} ⨯ permutation_group p);

L248812L248817
have hMappedIn: \({\lambda h\in p,\;\left(\left(\left(e,\lambda q\in p,\;{\lambda z,\;\left(e\right)\left(z\right)}^{-1}({idx\left(q\right)})\right)\right)\left(0\right)\right)\left(\left(\left(\left(e,\lambda q\in p,\;{\lambda z,\;\left(e\right)\left(z\right)}^{-1}({idx\left(q\right)})\right)\right)\left(1\right)\right)\left(h\right)\right)} \in {{n}^{{p}}}\) by hTuplePermutationMaps, hPairIn;
formal
statement: (λh ∈ p ⇒ (e,(λq ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx q))) 0 ((e,(λq ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx q))) 1 h)) ∈ np;
proof term: exact (SepE1 (np) (λz ⇒ not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ z i = z j)) (λh ∈ p ⇒ (e,(λq ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx q))) 0 ((e,(λq ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx q))) 1 h)) (hTuplePermutationMaps (e,(λq ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx q))) hPairIn));
L248824
have hMappedPointwise: \(\forall h\in p,\;{\left(\lambda q\in p,\;\left(\left(\left(e,\lambda k\in p,\;{\lambda z,\;\left(e\right)\left(z\right)}^{-1}({idx\left(k\right)})\right)\right)\left(0\right)\right)\left(\left(\left(\left(e,\lambda k\in p,\;{\lambda z,\;\left(e\right)\left(z\right)}^{-1}({idx\left(k\right)})\right)\right)\left(1\right)\right)\left(q\right)\right)\right)\left(h\right)} = {idx\left(h\right)}\);
proof from hEBij (13 steps)
statement: ∀h ∈ p, (λq ∈ p ⇒ (e,(λk ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx k))) 0 ((e,(λk ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx k))) 1 q)) h = idx h;

let h; assume hh;
L248831L248833
have hInverseEval: \({\left(e\right)\left({\lambda z,\;\left(e\right)\left(z\right)}^{-1}({idx\left(h\right)})\right)} = {idx\left(h\right)}\) by bijection_surjective from hEBij, hh;
formal
statement: e (inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx h)) = idx h;
proof term: exact (andER (inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx h) ∈ p) (e (inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx h)) = idx h) (surj_rinv p {idx i|i ∈ p} (λz ⇒ e z) (god1_bijection_surjective p {idx i|i ∈ p} (λz ⇒ e z) hEBij) (idx h) (ReplI p (λi ⇒ idx i) h hh)));
L248840L248842
have hPairZero: \({\left(\left(e,\lambda k\in p,\;{\lambda z,\;\left(e\right)\left(z\right)}^{-1}({idx\left(k\right)})\right)\right)\left(0\right)} = {e}\) by tuple_2_0_eq;
formal
statement: (e,(λk ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx k))) 0 = e;
proof term: exact (tuple_2_0_eq e (λk ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx k)));
L248844L248847
have hPairOne: \({\left(\left(e,\lambda k\in p,\;{\lambda z,\;\left(e\right)\left(z\right)}^{-1}({idx\left(k\right)})\right)\right)\left(1\right)} = {\lambda k\in p,\;{\lambda z,\;\left(e\right)\left(z\right)}^{-1}({idx\left(k\right)})}\) by tuple_2_1_eq;
formal
statement: (e,(λk ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx k))) 1 = (λk ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx k));

L248849L248852
have hSigmaEval: \({\left(\lambda k\in p,\;{\lambda z,\;\left(e\right)\left(z\right)}^{-1}({idx\left(k\right)})\right)\left(h\right)} = {{\lambda z,\;\left(e\right)\left(z\right)}^{-1}({idx\left(h\right)})}\) by beta from hh;
formal
statement: (λk ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx k)) h = inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx h);
proof term: exact (beta p (λk ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx k)) h hh);
L248853L248857
have hRawEval: \({\left(\left(\left(e,\lambda k\in p,\;{\lambda z,\;\left(e\right)\left(z\right)}^{-1}({idx\left(k\right)})\right)\right)\left(0\right)\right)\left(\left(\left(\left(e,\lambda k\in p,\;{\lambda z,\;\left(e\right)\left(z\right)}^{-1}({idx\left(k\right)})\right)\right)\left(1\right)\right)\left(h\right)\right)} = {\left(e\right)\left({\lambda z,\;\left(e\right)\left(z\right)}^{-1}({idx\left(h\right)})\right)}\) by transitivity from hPairZero, hPairOne, hSigmaEval;
formal
statement: (e,(λk ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx k))) 0 ((e,(λk ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx k))) 1 h) = e (inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx h));

L248879
thus thesis by transitivity from hh, hRawEval, hInverseEval;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra ((λq ∈ p ⇒ (e,(λk ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx k))) 0 ((e,(λk ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx k))) 1 q)) h) (e (inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx h))) (idx h) (eq_i_tra ((λq ∈ p ⇒ (e,(λk ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx k))) 0 ((e,(λk ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx k))) 1 q)) h) ((e,(λk ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx k))) 0 ((e,(λk ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx k))) 1 h)) (e (inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx h))) (beta p (λq ⇒ (e,(λk ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx k))) 0 ((e,(λk ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx k))) 1 q)) h hh) hRawEval) hInverseEval);
end;
L248898L248903
have hMappedEq: \({\lambda h\in p,\;\left(\left(\left(e,\lambda q\in p,\;{\lambda z,\;\left(e\right)\left(z\right)}^{-1}({idx\left(q\right)})\right)\right)\left(0\right)\right)\left(\left(\left(\left(e,\lambda q\in p,\;{\lambda z,\;\left(e\right)\left(z\right)}^{-1}({idx\left(q\right)})\right)\right)\left(1\right)\right)\left(h\right)\right)} = {idx}\) by extensionality from hMappedIn, hidxIn, hMappedPointwise;

statement: (λh ∈ p ⇒ (e,(λq ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx q))) 0 ((e,(λq ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx q))) 1 h)) = idx;

L248908
thus thesis by witness \(\left(e,\lambda h\in p,\;{\lambda q,\;\left(e\right)\left(q\right)}^{-1}({idx\left(h\right)})\right)\) from hPairIn, hMappedEq;
formal
exact (ex_intro (λu ⇒ u ∈ ({z ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p z} ⨯ permutation_group p) ∧ (λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) = idx) (e,(λh ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (idx h))) (andI ((e,(λh ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λq ⇒ e q) (idx h))) ∈ ({z ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p z} ⨯ permutation_group p)) ((λh ∈ p ⇒ (e,(λq ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx q))) 0 ((e,(λq ∈ p ⇒ inv p (λz ⇒ e z) (idx q))) 1 h)) = idx) hPairIn hMappedEq));

end;
L248923
thus thesis by choose from hEnumeration, hBuildFromEnumeration;
formal
exact (exandE_i (λe ⇒ e ∈ {idx i|i ∈ p}p) (λe ⇒ bij p {idx i|i ∈ p} (λi ⇒ e i) ∧ ∀i j ∈ p, i ∈ j → e i ∈ e j) hEnumeration (∃u ∈ ({z ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p z} ⨯ permutation_group p), (λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) = idx) hBuildFromEnumeration);
end;
L248933
thus thesis by bijectivity from hTuplePermutationMaps, hTuplePermutationInjective, hTuplePermutationSurjective;
formal
exact (bijI ({idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} ⨯ permutation_group p) {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)} (λu ⇒ λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) hTuplePermutationMaps hTuplePermutationInjective hTuplePermutationSurjective);
end;
L248941
have h_s23_t9_regrouped_over_permutations: \(c_{i_1\ldots i_p}=0,\ c_{i_\sigma}=\varepsilon(\sigma)c_i \to \forall x\in {X}^{{p}},\;\exists \mathsf{term}:set \to set \to set,\;{\forall idx\in \left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\},\;\forall \mathsf{sigma}\in \mathfrak S({p}),\;{\mathsf{term}\left(idx,\mathsf{sigma}\right)} = {\mathsf{smulM}\left(\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;\left([{x\left(h\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(\left(\lambda q\in p,\;idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(q\right)\right)\right)\left(h\right)\right)}_i,f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(\left(\lambda q\in p,\;idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(q\right)\right)\right)\left(h\right)\right)\right)\right)}} \land {{f\left(x\right)} = {\sum_{i\in {\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\}}}{\lambda idx,\;\sum_{i\in {\mathfrak S({p})}}{\lambda \mathsf{sigma},\;\mathsf{term}\left(idx,\mathsf{sigma}\right)}_i}_i}}\);
proof from h_s23_t9_restrict_to_distinct_indices, hp, hn, hModule, h_s23_t9_increasing_tuple_permutation_bijection, h_s23_t9_strict_tuple_injective (85 steps)
statement: alternating_basis_coefficient_conditions K addK mulK X addX smulX M addM smulM n p a f → ∀x ∈ Xp, ∃term : set → set → set, (∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx}, ∀sigma ∈ permutation_group p, term idx sigma = smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) ((λq ∈ p ⇒ idx (sigma q)) h))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a ((λq ∈ p ⇒ idx (sigma q)) h)))) ∧ f x = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (λidx ⇒ module_finitely_supported_sum M addM (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ term idx sigma));
L248961L248962L248963
assume hConditions; let x; assume hx;
L248964L248979
have hRestricted: \(\exists \mathsf{summand}:set \to set,\;{{\forall idx\in \left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid \neg {\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}}}\right\},\;{\mathsf{summand}\left(idx\right)} \in {M}} \land {\forall idx\in \left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid \neg {\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}}}\right\},\;{\mathsf{summand}\left(idx\right)} = {\mathsf{smulM}\left(\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;\left([{x\left(h\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)}_i,f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)\right)}}} \land {{f\left(x\right)} = {\sum_{i\in {\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid \neg {\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}}}\right\}}}{\mathsf{summand}}_i}}\) by h_s23_t9_restrict_to_distinct_indices from hConditions, hx;
formal
statement: ∃summand : set → set, ((∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)}, summand idx ∈ M) ∧ (∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)}, summand idx = smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))))) ∧ f x = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)} summand;
proof term: exact (h_s23_t9_restrict_to_distinct_indices hConditions x hx);

have hSummandPrefix: \({\forall idx\in \left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid \neg {\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}}}\right\},\;{\mathsf{summand}\left(idx\right)} \in {M}} \land {\forall idx\in \left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid \neg {\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}}}\right\},\;{\mathsf{summand}\left(idx\right)} = {\mathsf{smulM}\left(\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;\left([{x\left(h\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)}_i,f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)\right)}}\) by hSummandData;
formal
statement: (∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)}, summand idx ∈ M) ∧ (∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)}, summand idx = smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))));

statement: ∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)}, summand idx ∈ M;

formal
statement: ∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)}, summand idx = smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx h))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)));

formal
statement: f x = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)} summand;

statement: finite (np);
proof term: exact (god1_dependent_natural_product_finite p hp (λh ⇒ n) (λh hh ⇒ hn));

have hFiniteDistinct: \(\mathrm{finite}({\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid \neg {\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}}}\right\}})\) by Subq_finite from hFiniteAll;
formal
statement: finite {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)};

statement: finite {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx};

formal
statement: finite ({idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} ⨯ permutation_group p);

formal
statement: abelian_group M addM;
proof term: exact (andER (ring K addK mulK) (abelian_group M addM) (god1_left_module_ring_and_additive_component K addK mulK M addM smulM hModule));
L249098L249102
have hPairTerms: \(\forall u\in {\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\}} \times {\mathfrak S({p})},\;{\mathsf{summand}\left(\lambda h\in p,\;u\left(0,u\left(1,h\right)\right)\right)} \in {M}\) by hSummandIn from hSummandIn, h_s23_t9_increasing_tuple_permutation_bijection;
formal
statement: ∀u ∈ ({idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} ⨯ permutation_group p), summand (λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) ∈ M;
proof term: exact (λu hu ⇒ hSummandIn (λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) (god1_bijection_maps_into ({idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} ⨯ permutation_group p) {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)} (λz ⇒ λh ∈ p ⇒ z 0 (z 1 h)) h_s23_t9_increasing_tuple_permutation_bijection u hu));
L249111L249119
have hReindexed: \({\sum_{i\in {\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid \neg {\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}}}\right\}}}{\mathsf{summand}}_i} = {\sum_{i\in {{\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\}} \times {\mathfrak S({p})}}}{\lambda u,\;\mathsf{summand}\left(\lambda h\in p,\;u\left(0,u\left(1,h\right)\right)\right)}_i}\) by module_finitely_supported_sum_bijection_invariant from hAbelian, hFiniteProduct, hFiniteDistinct, h_s23_t9_increasing_tuple_permutation_bijection, hSummandIn;
formal
statement: module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)} summand = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM ({idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} ⨯ permutation_group p) (λu ⇒ summand (λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)));
proof term: exact (god1_module_finitely_supported_sum_bijection_invariant M addM hAbelian ({idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} ⨯ permutation_group p) {idx ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j)} hFiniteProduct hFiniteDistinct (λu ⇒ λh ∈ p ⇒ u 0 (u 1 h)) h_s23_t9_increasing_tuple_permutation_bijection summand hSummandIn);
L249129
have hDirectIndexIn: \(\forall idx\in \left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\},\;\forall \mathsf{sigma}\in \mathfrak S({p}),\;{\lambda h\in p,\;idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(h\right)\right)} \in {\left\{z\in {n}^{{p}}\mid \neg {\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{z\left(i\right)} = {z\left(j\right)}}}\right\}}\);
proof from h_s23_t9_strict_tuple_injective (30 steps)
statement: ∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx}, ∀sigma ∈ permutation_group p, (λh ∈ p ⇒ idx (sigma h)) ∈ {z ∈ np|not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ z i = z j)};
L249135L249136L249137L249138
let idx; assume hidx; let sigma; assume hsigma;
L249139L249140
have hidxIn: \({idx} \in {{n}^{{p}}}\) by hidx;
formal
statement: idx ∈ np;
proof term: exact (SepE1 (np) (λz ⇒ strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p z) idx hidx);
L249142L249143
have hidxStrict: \({p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\) by hidx;
formal
statement: strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx;
proof term: exact (SepE2 (np) (λz ⇒ strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p z) idx hidx);
L249145L249146
have hsigmaIn: \({\mathsf{sigma}} \in {{p}^{{p}}}\) by permutation_function_in from hsigma;
L249147L249148
have hsigmaBij: \({\lambda h,\;\mathsf{sigma}\left(h\right)} : {p} \xrightarrow{\sim} {p}\) by permutation_bijective from hsigma;
L249149L249150
have hDirectIn: \({\lambda h\in p,\;idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(h\right)\right)} \in {{n}^{{p}}}\) by lam_Pi from hidxIn, hsigmaIn;
formal
statement: (λh ∈ p ⇒ idx (sigma h)) ∈ np;

L249153L249155
have hidxInjective: \(\forall i,j\in p,\;{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)} \to {i} = {j}\) by h_s23_t9_strict_tuple_injective from hidxIn, hidxStrict;
L249156
have hDirectInjective: \(\forall i,j\in p,\;{idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(i\right)\right)} = {idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(j\right)\right)} \to {i} = {j}\);
proof from hsigmaIn, hsigmaBij, hidxInjective (9 steps)
statement: ∀i j ∈ p, idx (sigma i) = idx (sigma j) → i = j;
L249158L249159L249160L249161
let i; assume hi; let j; assume hj, hValues;
L249162L249163
have hsigmai: \({\mathsf{sigma}\left(i\right)} \in {p}\) by ap_Pi from hsigmaIn, hi;
formal
statement: sigma i ∈ p;
proof term: exact (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ p) sigma i hsigmaIn hi);
L249164L249165
have hsigmaj: \({\mathsf{sigma}\left(j\right)} \in {p}\) by ap_Pi from hsigmaIn, hj;
formal
statement: sigma j ∈ p;
proof term: exact (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ p) sigma j hsigmaIn hj);
L249166
thus thesis by bijection_injective from hsigmaBij, hi, hj, hidxInjective, hsigmai, hsigmaj, hValues;
formal
exact (god1_bijection_injective p p (λh ⇒ sigma h) hsigmaBij i hi j hj (hidxInjective (sigma i) hsigmai (sigma j) hsigmaj hValues));
end;
L249169
have hNoCollision: \(\neg {\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{\left(\lambda h\in p,\;idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(h\right)\right)\right)\left(i\right)} = {\left(\lambda h\in p,\;idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(h\right)\right)\right)\left(j\right)}}}\);
proof from hDirectInjective (2 steps)
statement: not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ (λh ∈ p ⇒ idx (sigma h)) i = (λh ∈ p ⇒ idx (sigma h)) j);
L249172
assume hCollision;
L249173
thus thesis by choose from hCollision, hDirectInjective;
formal

end;
L249204
thus thesis by set introduction from hDirectIn, hNoCollision;
formal
exact (SepI (np) (λz ⇒ not (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ z i = z j)) (λh ∈ p ⇒ idx (sigma h)) hDirectIn hNoCollision);

formal
exact (andI (∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx}, ∀sigma ∈ permutation_group p, summand (λh ∈ p ⇒ idx (sigma h)) = smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) ((λq ∈ p ⇒ idx (sigma q)) h))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a ((λq ∈ p ⇒ idx (sigma q)) h)))) (f x = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (λidx ⇒ module_finitely_supported_sum M addM (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ summand (λh ∈ p ⇒ idx (sigma h))))) (λidx hidx sigma hsigma ⇒ hSummandEq (λh ∈ p ⇒ idx (sigma h)) (hDirectIndexIn idx hidx sigma hsigma)) hRegroupedFormula);
end;
L249446L249454
have h_s23_t9_use_signature_relation: \(c_{i_1\ldots i_p}=0,\ c_{i_\sigma}=\varepsilon(\sigma)c_i \to \forall idx\in {n}^{{p}},\;\forall \mathsf{sigma}\in \mathfrak S({p}),\;{f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(h\right)\right)\right)\right)} = {\mathsf{smulM}\left(\varepsilon_{{\mathsf{sigma}}}\cdot 1_{{K}},f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)\right)}\) by calculation;
formal
statement: alternating_basis_coefficient_conditions K addK mulK X addX smulX M addM smulM n p a f → ∀idx ∈ np, ∀sigma ∈ permutation_group p, f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx (sigma h))) = smulM (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)));
proof term: exact (λhConditions ⇒ andER (∀idx ∈ np, (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ idx i = idx j) → f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) = module_zero M addM) (∀idx ∈ np, ∀sigma ∈ permutation_group p, f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx (sigma h))) = smulM (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) hConditions);
L249525
have h_s23_t9_determinant_definition: \(\forall idx\in {n}^{{p}},\;\forall x\in {X}^{{p}},\;{\det({(\xi_{{\lambda h,\;idx\left(h\right)}_i,j})_{i,j}})} = {\sum_{i\in {\mathfrak S({p})}}{\lambda \mathsf{sigma},\;\mathsf{mulK}\left(\varepsilon_{{\mathsf{sigma}}}\cdot 1_{{K}},\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda j,\;\left([{x\left(j\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(j\right)\right)\right)}_i\right)}_i}\);
proof from hp (27 steps)
statement: ∀idx ∈ np, ∀x ∈ Xp, matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j)) = module_finitely_supported_sum K addK (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ mulK (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λj ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x j) (idx (sigma j)))));
L249536L249537L249538L249539
let idx; assume hidx; let x; assume hx;
L249540
have hSummandPointwise: \(\forall \mathsf{sigma}\in \mathfrak S({p}),\;{\mathsf{mulK}\left(\varepsilon_{{\mathsf{sigma}}}\cdot 1_{{K}},\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda j,\;{(\xi_{{\lambda h,\;idx\left(h\right)}_i,j})_{i,j}}_{{\mathsf{sigma}\left(j\right)},{j}}}_i\right)} = {\mathsf{mulK}\left(\varepsilon_{{\mathsf{sigma}}}\cdot 1_{{K}},\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda j,\;\left([{x\left(j\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(j\right)\right)\right)}_i\right)}\);
proof from hp (17 steps)
statement: ∀sigma ∈ permutation_group p, mulK (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λj ⇒ matrix_entry (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λq ⇒ x q)) (sigma j) j)) = mulK (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λj ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x j) (idx (sigma j))));
L249551L249552
let sigma; assume hsigma;
L249553
have hEntryPointwise: \(\forall j\in p,\;{{(\xi_{{\lambda h,\;idx\left(h\right)}_i,j})_{i,j}}_{{\mathsf{sigma}\left(j\right)},{j}}} = {\left([{x\left(j\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(j\right)\right)\right)}\);
proof from hsigma (13 steps)
statement: ∀j ∈ p, matrix_entry (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λq ⇒ x q)) (sigma j) j = basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x j) (idx (sigma j));
L249560L249561
let j; assume hj;
L249562L249563
have hsigmaj: \({\mathsf{sigma}\left(j\right)} \in {p}\) by permutation_function_in from hsigma, hj;
formal
statement: sigma j ∈ p;
proof term: exact (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ p) sigma j (god1_permutation_function_in p sigma hsigma) hj);
L249565L249566
have hPairOne: \({\left(\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(j\right),j\right)\right)\left(1\right)} = {j}\) by tuple_2_1_eq;
L249567L249568
have hPairZero: \({\left(\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(j\right),j\right)\right)\left(0\right)} = {\mathsf{sigma}\left(j\right)}\) by tuple_2_0_eq;
L249569L249570
have hXPairOne: \({x\left(\left(\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(j\right),j\right)\right)\left(1\right)\right)} = {x\left(j\right)}\) by substitution from hPairOne;
formal
statement: x ((sigma j,j) 1) = x j;
proof term: exact (f_eq_i (λz : set ⇒ ap x z) ((sigma j,j) 1) j hPairOne);
L249572L249573
have hIndexPairZero: \({idx\left(\left(\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(j\right),j\right)\right)\left(0\right)\right)} = {idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(j\right)\right)}\) by substitution from hPairZero;
formal
statement: idx ((sigma j,j) 0) = idx (sigma j);
proof term: exact (f_eq_i (λz : set ⇒ ap idx z) ((sigma j,j) 0) (sigma j) hPairZero);
L249575
thus thesis by transitivity from hsigmaj, hj, hXPairOne, hIndexPairZero;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_entry (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λq ⇒ x q)) (sigma j) j) (basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x ((sigma j,j) 1)) (idx ((sigma j,j) 0))) (basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x j) (idx (sigma j))) (beta (p ⨯ p) (λu ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x (u 1)) (idx (u 0))) (sigma j,j) (tuple_2_setprod p p (sigma j) hsigmaj j hj)) (eq_i_tra (basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x ((sigma j,j) 1)) (idx ((sigma j,j) 0))) (basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x j) (idx ((sigma j,j) 0))) (basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x j) (idx (sigma j))) (f_eq_i (λz ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a z (idx ((sigma j,j) 0))) (x ((sigma j,j) 1)) (x j) hXPairOne) (f_eq_i (λq ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x j) q) (idx ((sigma j,j) 0)) (idx (sigma j)) hIndexPairZero)));
end;
L249606
thus thesis by substitution using ring_finite_product_congr_natural from hp, hEntryPointwise;
formal
exact (f_eq_i (mulK (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma)) (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λj ⇒ matrix_entry (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λq ⇒ x q)) (sigma j) j)) (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λj ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x j) (idx (sigma j)))) (god1_ring_finite_product_congr_natural K addK mulK p hp (λj ⇒ matrix_entry (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λq ⇒ x q)) (sigma j) j) (λj ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x j) (idx (sigma j))) hEntryPointwise));
end;
L249625L249626
have hFinitePermutations: \(\mathrm{finite}({\mathfrak S({p})})\) by permutation_group_finite from hp;
L249627L249635
have hFiniteSupport: \({\lambda \mathsf{sigma},\;\mathsf{mulK}\left(\varepsilon_{{\mathsf{sigma}}}\cdot 1_{{K}},\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda j,\;{(\xi_{{\lambda h,\;idx\left(h\right)}_i,j})_{i,j}}_{{\mathsf{sigma}\left(j\right)},{j}}}_i\right)}_i=0\text{ for almost all }i\in {\mathfrak S({p})}\) by Subq_finite from hFinitePermutations;
formal
statement: almost_all_zero (permutation_group p) (ring_zero K addK) (λsigma ⇒ mulK (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λj ⇒ matrix_entry (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λq ⇒ x q)) (sigma j) j)));
proof term: exact (Subq_finite (permutation_group p) hFinitePermutations (nonzero_support (permutation_group p) (ring_zero K addK) (λsigma ⇒ mulK (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λj ⇒ matrix_entry (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λq ⇒ x q)) (sigma j) j)))) (λsigma hsigma ⇒ SepE1 (permutation_group p) (λq ⇒ mulK (signature_scalar K addK mulK p q) (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λj ⇒ matrix_entry (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λr ⇒ x r)) (q j) j)) ≠ ring_zero K addK) sigma hsigma));
L249654
thus thesis by module_finitely_supported_sum_congr_equality from hFiniteSupport, hSummandPointwise;
formal
exact (god1_module_finitely_supported_sum_congr_equality K addK (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ mulK (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λj ⇒ matrix_entry (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λq ⇒ x q)) (sigma j) j))) (λsigma ⇒ mulK (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λj ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x j) (idx (sigma j))))) hFiniteSupport hSummandPointwise);
end;
L249667
have h_s23_t9_finite_scalar_sum_action: \(\forall I,\;\mathrm{finite}({I}) \to \forall c\in M,\;\forall \mathsf{scalar}:set \to set,\;\forall i\in I,\;{\mathsf{scalar}\left(i\right)} \in {K} \to {\sum_{i\in {I}}{\lambda i,\;\mathsf{smulM}\left(\mathsf{scalar}\left(i\right),c\right)}_i} = {\mathsf{smulM}\left(\sum_{i\in {I}}{\mathsf{scalar}}_i,c\right)}\);
proof from hRing, hModule (27 steps)
statement: ∀I, finite I → ∀c ∈ M, ∀scalar : set → set, (∀i ∈ I, scalar i ∈ K) → module_finitely_supported_sum M addM I (λi ⇒ smulM (scalar i) c) = smulM (module_finitely_supported_sum K addK I scalar) c;
L249673L249674L249675L249676L249677L249678
let I; assume hFiniteI; let c; assume hc; let scalar; assume hScalarMaps;
L249679L249680
have hCoreRing: \(({K},{\mathsf{addK}},{\mathsf{mulK}})\text{ is a ring}\) by hRing;
formal
statement: ring K addK mulK;
proof term: exact (andEL (ring K addK mulK) (commutative_on K mulK) hRing);
L249681L249682
have hAddGroup: \(({K},{\mathsf{addK}})\text{ is a group}\) by ring_additive_abelian_group from hCoreRing;
formal
statement: group K addK;
proof term: exact (andEL (group K addK) (commutative_on K addK) (god1_ring_additive_abelian_group K addK mulK hCoreRing));
L249684L249685
have hAbelianM: \(({M},{\mathsf{addM}})\text{ is an abelian group}\) by left_module_ring_and_additive_component from hModule;
formal
statement: abelian_group M addM;
proof term: exact (andER (ring K addK mulK) (abelian_group M addM) (god1_left_module_ring_and_additive_component K addK mulK M addM smulM hModule));
L249688L249689
have hGroupM: \(({M},{\mathsf{addM}})\text{ is a group}\) by hAbelianM;
formal
statement: group M addM;
proof term: exact (andEL (group M addM) (commutative_on M addM) hAbelianM);
L249690L249694
have hScalarCore: \({\forall q\in K,\;\forall z\in M,\;{\mathsf{smulM}\left(q,z\right)} \in {M}} \land {\forall q,r\in K,\;\forall z\in M,\;{\mathsf{smulM}\left(q,\mathsf{smulM}\left(r,z\right)\right)} = {\mathsf{smulM}\left(\mathsf{mulK}\left(q,r\right),z\right)}}\) by left_module_scalar_core_component from hModule;
formal
statement: (∀q ∈ K, ∀z ∈ M, smulM q z ∈ M) ∧ (∀q r ∈ K, ∀z ∈ M, smulM q (smulM r z) = smulM (mulK q r) z);
proof term: exact (god1_left_module_scalar_core_component K addK mulK M addM smulM hModule);
L249696L249697
have hScalarActionMaps: \(\forall q\in K,\;{\mathsf{smulM}\left(q,c\right)} \in {M}\) by hScalarCore, hc;
formal
statement: ∀q ∈ K, smulM q c ∈ M;
proof term: exact (λq hq ⇒ andEL (∀s ∈ K, ∀z ∈ M, smulM s z ∈ M) (∀s t ∈ K, ∀z ∈ M, smulM s (smulM t z) = smulM (mulK s t) z) hScalarCore q hq c hc);
L249702
have hScalarAdd: \(\forall q,r\in K,\;{\mathsf{smulM}\left(\mathsf{addK}\left(q,r\right),c\right)} = {\mathsf{addM}\left(\mathsf{smulM}\left(q,c\right),\mathsf{smulM}\left(r,c\right)\right)}\);
proof from hModule, hc (3 steps)
statement: ∀q r ∈ K, smulM (addK q r) c = addM (smulM q c) (smulM r c);
L249704L249708
have hScalarAddPrefix: \({\forall z\in M,\;{\mathsf{smulM}\left(1_{{K}},z\right)} = {z}} \land {\forall q,r\in K,\;\forall z\in M,\;{\mathsf{smulM}\left(\mathsf{addK}\left(q,r\right),z\right)} = {\mathsf{addM}\left(\mathsf{smulM}\left(q,z\right),\mathsf{smulM}\left(r,z\right)\right)}}\) by left_module_scalar_add_component from hModule;
formal
statement: (∀z ∈ M, smulM (ring_one K mulK) z = z) ∧ (∀q r ∈ K, ∀z ∈ M, smulM (addK q r) z = addM (smulM q z) (smulM r z));
proof term: exact (god1_left_module_scalar_add_component K addK mulK M addM smulM hModule);
L249710
thus thesis by hScalarAddPrefix, hc;
formal
exact (λq hq r hr ⇒ andER (∀z ∈ M, smulM (ring_one K mulK) z = z) (∀s t ∈ K, ∀z ∈ M, smulM (addK s t) z = addM (smulM s z) (smulM t z)) hScalarAddPrefix q hq r hr c hc);
end;
L249728L249730
have hScalarSupport: \({\mathsf{scalar}}_i=0\text{ for almost all }i\in {I}\) by nonzero_support_subset from hFiniteI;
formal
statement: almost_all_zero I (module_zero K addK) scalar;
proof term: exact (Subq_finite I hFiniteI (nonzero_support I (module_zero K addK) scalar) (god1_nonzero_support_subset I (module_zero K addK) scalar));
L249733
thus thesis by symmetry using group_homomorphism_module_finitely_supported_sum from hAddGroup, hGroupM, hScalarActionMaps, hScalarAdd, hAbelianM, hScalarSupport, hScalarMaps;
formal
exact (eq_sym (smulM (module_finitely_supported_sum K addK I scalar) c) (module_finitely_supported_sum M addM I (λi ⇒ smulM (scalar i) c)) (god1_group_homomorphism_module_finitely_supported_sum K addK M addM (λq ⇒ smulM q c) hScalarActionHom hAbelianM I scalar hScalarSupport hScalarMaps));
1 source-level helper folded
hScalarActionHom: \({\lambda q,\;\mathsf{smulM}\left(q,c\right)}:{K}\to {M}\) by hAddGroup, hGroupM, hScalarActionMaps, hScalarAdd (conjunction assembly);
end;
L249740
have h_s23_t9_formula33: \(c_{i_1\ldots i_p}=0,\ c_{i_\sigma}=\varepsilon(\sigma)c_i \to \forall x\in {X}^{{p}},\;{f\left(x\right)} = {\sum_{i\in {\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\}}}{\lambda idx,\;\mathsf{smulM}\left(\det({(\xi_{{\lambda h,\;idx\left(h\right)}_i,j})_{i,j}}),f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)\right)}_i}\);
proof from h_s23_t9_regrouped_over_permutations, hRing, hBasis, hModule, hp, hn, hMultilinear, h_s23_t9_use_signature_relation, h_s23_t9_finite_scalar_sum_action, h_s23_t9_determinant_definition (89 steps)
statement: alternating_basis_coefficient_conditions K addK mulK X addX smulX M addM smulM n p a f → ∀x ∈ Xp, f x = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (λidx ⇒ smulM (matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))));
L249752L249753L249754
assume hConditions; let x; assume hx;
L249755L249770
have hRegrouped: \(\exists \mathsf{term}:set \to set \to set,\;{\forall idx\in \left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\},\;\forall \mathsf{sigma}\in \mathfrak S({p}),\;{\mathsf{term}\left(idx,\mathsf{sigma}\right)} = {\mathsf{smulM}\left(\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;\left([{x\left(h\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(\left(\lambda q\in p,\;idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(q\right)\right)\right)\left(h\right)\right)}_i,f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(\left(\lambda q\in p,\;idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(q\right)\right)\right)\left(h\right)\right)\right)\right)}} \land {{f\left(x\right)} = {\sum_{i\in {\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\}}}{\lambda idx,\;\sum_{i\in {\mathfrak S({p})}}{\lambda \mathsf{sigma},\;\mathsf{term}\left(idx,\mathsf{sigma}\right)}_i}_i}}\) by h_s23_t9_regrouped_over_permutations from hConditions, hx;
formal
statement: ∃term : set → set → set, (∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx}, ∀sigma ∈ permutation_group p, term idx sigma = smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) ((λq ∈ p ⇒ idx (sigma q)) h))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a ((λq ∈ p ⇒ idx (sigma q)) h)))) ∧ f x = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (λidx ⇒ module_finitely_supported_sum M addM (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ term idx sigma));
proof term: exact (h_s23_t9_regrouped_over_permutations hConditions x hx);
L249771
apply hRegrouped;
L249772L249773
let term; assume hTermData;
L249774L249784
have hTermFormula: \(\forall idx\in \left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\},\;\forall \mathsf{sigma}\in \mathfrak S({p}),\;{\mathsf{term}\left(idx,\mathsf{sigma}\right)} = {\mathsf{smulM}\left(\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;\left([{x\left(h\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(\left(\lambda q\in p,\;idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(q\right)\right)\right)\left(h\right)\right)}_i,f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(\left(\lambda q\in p,\;idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(q\right)\right)\right)\left(h\right)\right)\right)\right)}\) by hTermData;
formal
statement: ∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx}, ∀sigma ∈ permutation_group p, term idx sigma = smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) ((λq ∈ p ⇒ idx (sigma q)) h))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a ((λq ∈ p ⇒ idx (sigma q)) h)));
proof term: exact (andEL (∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx}, ∀sigma ∈ permutation_group p, term idx sigma = smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) ((λq ∈ p ⇒ idx (sigma q)) h))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a ((λq ∈ p ⇒ idx (sigma q)) h)))) (f x = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (λidx ⇒ module_finitely_supported_sum M addM (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ term idx sigma))) hTermData);
L249800L249805
have hRegroupedFormula: \({f\left(x\right)} = {\sum_{i\in {\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\}}}{\lambda idx,\;\sum_{i\in {\mathfrak S({p})}}{\lambda \mathsf{sigma},\;\mathsf{term}\left(idx,\mathsf{sigma}\right)}_i}_i}\) by hTermData;
formal
statement: f x = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (λidx ⇒ module_finitely_supported_sum M addM (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ term idx sigma));
proof term: exact (andER (∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx}, ∀sigma ∈ permutation_group p, term idx sigma = smulM (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) ((λq ∈ p ⇒ idx (sigma q)) h))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a ((λq ∈ p ⇒ idx (sigma q)) h)))) (f x = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (λidx ⇒ module_finitely_supported_sum M addM (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ term idx sigma))) hTermData);
L249821L249822
have hCoreRing: \(({K},{\mathsf{addK}},{\mathsf{mulK}})\text{ is a ring}\) by hRing;
formal
statement: ring K addK mulK;
proof term: exact (andEL (ring K addK mulK) (commutative_on K mulK) hRing);
L249823L249824
have hCommutative: \(\forall x,y\in {K},\ {\mathsf{mulK}}(x,y)={\mathsf{mulK}}(y,x)\) by hRing;
formal
statement: commutative_on K mulK;
proof term: exact (andER (ring K addK mulK) (commutative_on K mulK) hRing);
L249825L249826
have hAddAbelian: \(({K},{\mathsf{addK}})\text{ is an abelian group}\) by ring_additive_abelian_group from hCoreRing;
L249827L249828
have hAddGroup: \(({K},{\mathsf{addK}})\text{ is a group}\) by hAddAbelian;
formal
statement: group K addK;
proof term: exact (andEL (group K addK) (commutative_on K addK) hAddAbelian);
L249829L249830
have hOneIn: \({1_{{K}}} \in {K}\) by ring_multiplicative_identity_specification from hCoreRing;
formal
statement: ring_one K mulK ∈ K;
proof term: exact (andEL (ring_one K mulK ∈ K) (∀z ∈ K, mulK z (ring_one K mulK) = z ∧ mulK (ring_one K mulK) z = z) (god1_ring_multiplicative_identity_specification K addK mulK hCoreRing));
L249837L249839
have hNegativeOneIn: \({-{1_{{K}}}} \in {K}\) by group_inverse_in from hAddGroup, hOneIn;
formal
statement: ring_negation K addK (ring_one K mulK) ∈ K;
proof term: exact (god1_group_inverse_in K addK hAddGroup (ring_one K mulK) hOneIn);
L249841
have hSignatureIn: \(\forall \mathsf{sigma}\in \mathfrak S({p}),\;{\varepsilon_{{\mathsf{sigma}}}\cdot 1_{{K}}} \in {K}\);
proof from hOneIn, hNegativeOneIn (3 steps)
L249843L249844
let sigma; assume hsigma;
L249845
thus thesis by orE from hOneIn, hNegativeOneIn;
formal
exact (orE (permutation_signature p sigma = 1) (not (permutation_signature p sigma = 1)) (xm (permutation_signature p sigma = 1)) (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma ∈ K) (λhOne ⇒ mem_eq_substL K (ring_one K mulK) (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (If_i_1 (permutation_signature p sigma = 1) (ring_one K mulK) (ring_negation K addK (ring_one K mulK)) hOne) hOneIn) (λhNotOne ⇒ mem_eq_substL K (ring_negation K addK (ring_one K mulK)) (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (If_i_0 (permutation_signature p sigma = 1) (ring_one K mulK) (ring_negation K addK (ring_one K mulK)) hNotOne) hNegativeOneIn));
end;
L249863L249864
have hBasisMaps: \(\forall i\in n,\;{a\left(i\right)} \in {X}\) by module_basis_vectors_map_into from hBasis;
formal
statement: ∀i ∈ n, a i ∈ X;
proof term: exact (god1_module_basis_vectors_map_into K addK mulK X addX smulX n a hBasis);
L249866L249870
have hScalarCore: \({\forall q\in K,\;\forall z\in M,\;{\mathsf{smulM}\left(q,z\right)} \in {M}} \land {\forall q,r\in K,\;\forall z\in M,\;{\mathsf{smulM}\left(q,\mathsf{smulM}\left(r,z\right)\right)} = {\mathsf{smulM}\left(\mathsf{mulK}\left(q,r\right),z\right)}}\) by left_module_scalar_core_component from hModule;
formal
statement: (∀q ∈ K, ∀z ∈ M, smulM q z ∈ M) ∧ (∀q r ∈ K, ∀z ∈ M, smulM q (smulM r z) = smulM (mulK q r) z);
proof term: exact (god1_left_module_scalar_core_component K addK mulK M addM smulM hModule);
L249872L249874
have hScalarAssoc: \(\forall q,r\in K,\;\forall z\in M,\;{\mathsf{smulM}\left(q,\mathsf{smulM}\left(r,z\right)\right)} = {\mathsf{smulM}\left(\mathsf{mulK}\left(q,r\right),z\right)}\) by hScalarCore;
formal
statement: ∀q r ∈ K, ∀z ∈ M, smulM q (smulM r z) = smulM (mulK q r) z;
proof term: exact (andER (∀q ∈ K, ∀z ∈ M, smulM q z ∈ M) (∀q r ∈ K, ∀z ∈ M, smulM q (smulM r z) = smulM (mulK q r) z) hScalarCore);
L249879L249880
have hFinitePermutations: \(\mathrm{finite}({\mathfrak S({p})})\) by permutation_group_finite from hp;
L249881L249882
have hFiniteAll: \(\mathrm{finite}({{n}^{{p}}})\) by dependent_natural_product_finite from hp, hn;
formal
statement: finite (np);
proof term: exact (god1_dependent_natural_product_finite p hp (λh ⇒ n) (λh hh ⇒ hn));
L249884L249886
have hFiniteIncreasing: \(\mathrm{finite}({\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\}})\) by Subq_finite from hFiniteAll;
formal
statement: finite {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx};
proof term: exact (Subq_finite (np) hFiniteAll {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (Sep_Subq (np) (λidx ⇒ strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx)));
L249890
have hInnerEquality: \(\forall idx\in \left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\},\;{\sum_{i\in {\mathfrak S({p})}}{\lambda \mathsf{sigma},\;\mathsf{term}\left(idx,\mathsf{sigma}\right)}_i} = {\mathsf{smulM}\left(\det({(\xi_{{\lambda h,\;idx\left(h\right)}_i,j})_{i,j}}),f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)\right)}\);

statement: ∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx}, module_finitely_supported_sum M addM (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ term idx sigma) = smulM (matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)));

let idx; assume hidxIncreasing;
L249901L249902
have hidxIn: \({idx} \in {{n}^{{p}}}\) by hidxIncreasing;
formal
statement: idx ∈ np;
proof term: exact (SepE1 (np) (λz ⇒ strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p z) idx hidxIncreasing);

formal
statement: (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) ∈ Xp;
proof term: exact (lam_Pi p (λh ⇒ X) (λh ⇒ a (idx h)) (λh hh ⇒ hBasisMaps (idx h) (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ n) idx h hidxIn hh)));

formal
statement: f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) ∈ M;

L249914

L249920L249921

exact (god1_ring_finite_product_in K addK mulK hCoreRing p (nat_finite p (omega_nat_p p hp)) (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx (sigma h))) (λh hh ⇒ god1_basis_coordinate_in K addK mulK X addX smulX n a hBasis (x h) (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ X) x h hx hh) (idx (sigma h)) (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ n) idx (sigma h) hidxIn (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ p) sigma h hsigmaIn hh))));
end;

statement: ∀sigma ∈ permutation_group p, mulK (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx (sigma h)))) ∈ K;

have hTermSumCong: \({\sum_{i\in {\mathfrak S({p})}}{\lambda \mathsf{sigma},\;\mathsf{term}\left(idx,\mathsf{sigma}\right)}_i} = {\sum_{i\in {\mathfrak S({p})}}{\lambda \mathsf{sigma},\;\mathsf{smulM}\left(\mathsf{mulK}\left(\varepsilon_{{\mathsf{sigma}}}\cdot 1_{{K}},\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;\left([{x\left(h\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(h\right)\right)\right)}_i\right),f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)\right)}_i}\) by module_finitely_supported_sum_congr_finite_index from hFinitePermutations, hTermSimplified;

have hScalarSumAction: \({\sum_{i\in {\mathfrak S({p})}}{\lambda \mathsf{sigma},\;\mathsf{smulM}\left(\mathsf{mulK}\left(\varepsilon_{{\mathsf{sigma}}}\cdot 1_{{K}},\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;\left([{x\left(h\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(h\right)\right)\right)}_i\right),f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)\right)}_i} = {\mathsf{smulM}\left(\sum_{i\in {\mathfrak S({p})}}{\lambda \mathsf{sigma},\;\mathsf{mulK}\left(\varepsilon_{{\mathsf{sigma}}}\cdot 1_{{K}},\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;\left([{x\left(h\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(h\right)\right)\right)}_i\right)}_i,f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)\right)}\) by h_s23_t9_finite_scalar_sum_action from hFinitePermutations, hCoefficientIn, hScalarMaps;
formal
statement: module_finitely_supported_sum M addM (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ smulM (mulK (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx (sigma h))))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) = smulM (module_finitely_supported_sum K addK (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ mulK (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx (sigma h)))))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)));
proof term: exact (h_s23_t9_finite_scalar_sum_action (permutation_group p) hFinitePermutations (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))) hCoefficientIn (λsigma ⇒ mulK (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx (sigma h))))) hScalarMaps);
L250216L250225
have hDeterminantExpansion: \({\det({(\xi_{{\lambda h,\;idx\left(h\right)}_i,j})_{i,j}})} = {\sum_{i\in {\mathfrak S({p})}}{\lambda \mathsf{sigma},\;\mathsf{mulK}\left(\varepsilon_{{\mathsf{sigma}}}\cdot 1_{{K}},\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;\left([{x\left(h\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(idx\left(\mathsf{sigma}\left(h\right)\right)\right)}_i\right)}_i}\) by h_s23_t9_determinant_definition from hidxIn, hx;
formal
statement: matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j)) = module_finitely_supported_sum K addK (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ mulK (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx (sigma h)))));
proof term: exact (h_s23_t9_determinant_definition idx hidxIn x hx);
L250226
thus thesis by transitivity from hTermSumCong, hScalarSumAction, hDeterminantExpansion;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (module_finitely_supported_sum M addM (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ term idx sigma)) (smulM (module_finitely_supported_sum K addK (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ mulK (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx (sigma h)))))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) (smulM (matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) (eq_i_tra (module_finitely_supported_sum M addM (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ term idx sigma)) (module_finitely_supported_sum M addM (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ smulM (mulK (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx (sigma h))))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))))) (smulM (module_finitely_supported_sum K addK (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ mulK (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx (sigma h)))))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) hTermSumCong hScalarSumAction) (f_eq_i (λq ⇒ smulM q (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) (module_finitely_supported_sum K addK (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ mulK (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx (sigma h)))))) (matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j))) (eq_sym (matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j))) (module_finitely_supported_sum K addK (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ mulK (signature_scalar K addK mulK p sigma) (ring_finite_product K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (x h) (idx (sigma h)))))) hDeterminantExpansion)));
end;
L250278L250290
have hOuterCong: \({\sum_{i\in {\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\}}}{\lambda idx,\;\sum_{i\in {\mathfrak S({p})}}{\lambda \mathsf{sigma},\;\mathsf{term}\left(idx,\mathsf{sigma}\right)}_i}_i} = {\sum_{i\in {\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\}}}{\lambda idx,\;\mathsf{smulM}\left(\det({(\xi_{{\lambda h,\;idx\left(h\right)}_i,j})_{i,j}}),f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)\right)}_i}\) by module_finitely_supported_sum_congr_finite_index from hFiniteIncreasing, hInnerEquality;
formal
statement: module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (λidx ⇒ module_finitely_supported_sum M addM (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ term idx sigma)) = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (λidx ⇒ smulM (matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))));
proof term: exact (god1_module_finitely_supported_sum_congr_finite_index M addM {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} hFiniteIncreasing (λidx ⇒ module_finitely_supported_sum M addM (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ term idx sigma)) (λidx ⇒ smulM (matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) hInnerEquality);
L250302
thus thesis by transitivity from hRegroupedFormula, hOuterCong;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (f x) (module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (λidx ⇒ module_finitely_supported_sum M addM (permutation_group p) (λsigma ⇒ term idx sigma))) (module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (λidx ⇒ smulM (matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))))) hRegroupedFormula hOuterCong);
end;
L250347
have h_s23_t9_determinant_as_exterior_product: \(\forall idx\in {n}^{{p}},\;\forall x\in {X}^{{p}},\;\exists u:set \to set,\;{\forall h\in p,\;\forall y\in X,\;{{u\left(h\right)}({y})} = {f_{{idx\left(h\right)}}}} \land {{\det({(\xi_{{\lambda h,\;idx\left(h\right)}_i,j})_{i,j}})} = {\left(\bigwedge_{i\in {p}}{u}_i\right)\left(x\right)}}\);
proof from hp, hRing, hBasis (6 steps)
statement: ∀idx ∈ np, ∀x ∈ Xp, ∃u : set → set, (∀h ∈ p, ∀y ∈ X, ap (u h) y = basis_coordinate_function K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (idx h) y) ∧ matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j)) = exterior_product_linear_forms K addK mulK X p u x;
L250358L250359L250360L250361
let idx; assume hidx; let x; assume hx;
L250362
take \(\lambda h,\;\mathsf{god1\_basis\_coordinate\_function\_family}\left(K,\mathsf{addK},\mathsf{mulK},X,\mathsf{addX},\mathsf{smulX},n,a,idx\left(h\right)\right)\);
L250364
thus thesis by hp, hRing, hBasis, hidx, hx;
formal
exact (andI (∀h ∈ p, ∀y ∈ X, ap (god1_basis_coordinate_function_family K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (idx h)) y = basis_coordinate_function K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (idx h) y) (matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j)) = exterior_product_linear_forms K addK mulK X p (λh ⇒ god1_basis_coordinate_function_family K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (idx h)) x) (λh hh y hy ⇒ beta X (λz ⇒ basis_coordinates K addK mulK X addX smulX n a z (idx h)) y hy) (god1_selected_coordinate_determinant_as_exterior_product K addK mulK X addX smulX n p hp a hRing hBasis idx hidx x hx));
end;
L250406L250418
have h_s23_t9_example2_alternating_formal_call: \(\forall K0,\;\forall \mathsf{add0},\mathsf{mul0}:set \to set \to set,\;\forall p0\in \omega,\;\forall X0,\;\forall \mathsf{addX0},\mathsf{smulX0}:set \to set \to set,\;\forall u0:set \to set,\;{0} \in {p0} \to ({K0},{\mathsf{add0}},{\mathsf{mul0}})\text{ is a commutative ring} \to \forall i\in p0,\;{\lambda x0,\;u0\left(i,x0\right)}:{X0}\to {K0} \to {\mathsf{add0}}\in\operatorname{Alt}^{{p0}}({X0},{\mathsf{addX0}})\) by exterior_product_of_linear_forms_is_alternating;
formal
statement: ∀K0, ∀add0 mul0 : set → set → set, ∀p0 ∈ ω, ∀X0, ∀addX0 smulX0 : set → set → set, ∀u0 : set → set, 0 ∈ p0 → commutative_ring K0 add0 mul0 → (∀i ∈ p0, module_homomorphism K0 add0 mul0 X0 addX0 smulX0 K0 add0 mul0 (λx0 ⇒ u0 i x0)) → alternating_multilinear_mapping K0 add0 mul0 p0 X0 addX0 smulX0 K0 add0 mul0 (λx0 ⇒ exterior_product_linear_forms K0 add0 mul0 X0 p0 u0 x0);
proof term: apply god1_exterior_product_of_linear_forms_is_alternating;
L250419
have h_s23_t9_alternating_conclusion: \(c_{i_1\ldots i_p}=0,\ c_{i_\sigma}=\varepsilon(\sigma)c_i \to {\mathsf{addM}}\in\operatorname{Alt}^{{p}}({X},{\mathsf{addX}})\);
proof from hMultilinear, hPositive, hRing, hBasis, hp, hn, hModule, h_s23_t9_formula33, h_s23_t9_determinant_as_exterior_product, h_s23_t9_example2_alternating_formal_call (61 steps)
statement: alternating_basis_coefficient_conditions K addK mulK X addX smulX M addM smulM n p a f → alternating_multilinear_mapping K addK mulK p X addX smulX M addM smulM f;
L250424
assume hConditions;
L250425L250426
have hXModule: \({X}\text{ is a left }{K}\text{-module}\) by multilinear_mapping_source_modules from hMultilinear, hPositive;
formal
statement: left_module K addK mulK X addX smulX;
proof term: exact (god1_multilinear_mapping_source_modules K addK mulK p (λi ⇒ X) (λi ⇒ addX) (λi ⇒ smulX) M addM smulM f hMultilinear 0 hPositive);
L250429L250430
have hCoreRing: \(({K},{\mathsf{addK}},{\mathsf{mulK}})\text{ is a ring}\) by hRing;
formal
statement: ring K addK mulK;
proof term: exact (andEL (ring K addK mulK) (commutative_on K mulK) hRing);
L250431L250432
have hKModule: \({K}\text{ is a left }{K}\text{-module}\) by ring_left_regular_module from hCoreRing;
L250433L250434
have hBasisMaps: \(\forall i\in n,\;{a\left(i\right)} \in {X}\) by module_basis_vectors_map_into from hBasis;
formal
statement: ∀i ∈ n, a i ∈ X;
proof term: exact (god1_module_basis_vectors_map_into K addK mulK X addX smulX n a hBasis);
L250436L250437
have hFiniteAll: \(\mathrm{finite}({{n}^{{p}}})\) by dependent_natural_product_finite from hp, hn;
formal
statement: finite (np);
proof term: exact (god1_dependent_natural_product_finite p hp (λh ⇒ n) (λh hh ⇒ hn));
L250439L250441
have hFiniteIncreasing: \(\mathrm{finite}({\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\}})\) by Subq_finite from hFiniteAll;
formal
statement: finite {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx};
proof term: exact (Subq_finite (np) hFiniteAll {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (Sep_Subq (np) (λidx ⇒ strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx)));
L250445
have hScalarZero: \(\forall y\in M,\;{\mathsf{smulM}\left(0_{{K}},y\right)} = {0_{{M}}}\);
proof from hModule (3 steps)
L250447L250452
have hZeroPrefix: \({\forall \mathsf{scalar}\in K,\;{\mathsf{smulM}\left(\mathsf{scalar},0_{{M}}\right)} = {0_{{M}}}} \land {\forall y\in M,\;{\mathsf{smulM}\left(0_{{K}},y\right)} = {0_{{M}}}}\) by module_zero_and_negation_scalar_laws from hModule;
formal
statement: ((∀scalar ∈ K, smulM scalar (module_zero M addM) = module_zero M addM) ∧ (∀y ∈ M, smulM (ring_zero K addK) y = module_zero M addM));
proof term: exact (andEL ((∀scalar ∈ K, smulM scalar (module_zero M addM) = module_zero M addM) ∧ (∀y ∈ M, smulM (ring_zero K addK) y = module_zero M addM)) (∀y ∈ M, module_negation M addM y = smulM (ring_negation K addK (ring_one K mulK)) y) (god1_module_zero_and_negation_scalar_laws K addK mulK M addM smulM hModule));
L250461
thus thesis by hZeroPrefix;
formal
exact (andER (∀scalar ∈ K, smulM scalar (module_zero M addM) = module_zero M addM) (∀y ∈ M, smulM (ring_zero K addK) y = module_zero M addM) hZeroPrefix);
end;
L250467
have hRepeatedVanish: \(\forall x\in {X}^{{p}},\;\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{x\left(i\right)} = {x\left(j\right)}} \to {f\left(x\right)} = {0_{{M}}}\);
proof from h_s23_t9_formula33, hConditions, h_s23_t9_determinant_as_exterior_product, hBasis, hXModule, hKModule, h_s23_t9_example2_alternating_formal_call, hp, hPositive, hRing, hBasisMaps, hMultilinear, hScalarZero, hFiniteIncreasing (42 steps)
statement: ∀x ∈ Xp, (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ x i = x j) → f x = module_zero M addM;
L250470L250471
let x; assume hx, hRepeated;
L250472L250480
have hFormula: \({f\left(x\right)} = {\sum_{i\in {\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\}}}{\lambda idx,\;\mathsf{smulM}\left(\det({(\xi_{{\lambda h,\;idx\left(h\right)}_i,j})_{i,j}}),f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)\right)}_i}\) by h_s23_t9_formula33 from hConditions, hx;
formal
statement: f x = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (λidx ⇒ smulM (matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))));
proof term: exact (h_s23_t9_formula33 hConditions x hx);
L250481
have hTermZero: \(\forall idx\in \left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\},\;{\mathsf{smulM}\left(\det({(\xi_{{\lambda h,\;idx\left(h\right)}_i,j})_{i,j}}),f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)\right)} = {0_{{M}}}\);
proof from h_s23_t9_determinant_as_exterior_product, hx, hBasis, hXModule, hKModule, h_s23_t9_example2_alternating_formal_call, hp, hPositive, hRing, hRepeated, hBasisMaps, hMultilinear, hScalarZero (34 steps)
statement: ∀idx ∈ {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx}, smulM (matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))) = module_zero M addM;
L250489L250490
let idx; assume hidxIncreasing;
L250491L250492
have hidxIn: \({idx} \in {{n}^{{p}}}\) by hidxIncreasing;
formal
statement: idx ∈ np;
proof term: exact (SepE1 (np) (λz ⇒ strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p z) idx hidxIncreasing);
L250495L250503
have hDetExterior: \(\exists u:set \to set,\;{\forall h\in p,\;\forall y\in X,\;{{u\left(h\right)}({y})} = {f_{{idx\left(h\right)}}}} \land {{\det({(\xi_{{\lambda h,\;idx\left(h\right)}_i,j})_{i,j}})} = {\left(\bigwedge_{i\in {p}}{u}_i\right)\left(x\right)}}\) by h_s23_t9_determinant_as_exterior_product from hidxIn, hx;
formal
statement: ∃u : set → set, (∀h ∈ p, ∀y ∈ X, ap (u h) y = basis_coordinate_function K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (idx h) y) ∧ matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j)) = exterior_product_linear_forms K addK mulK X p u x;
proof term: exact (h_s23_t9_determinant_as_exterior_product idx hidxIn x hx);
L250504
apply hDetExterior;
L250505L250506
let u; assume hUData;
L250507L250510
have hURelation: \(\forall h\in p,\;\forall y\in X,\;{{u\left(h\right)}({y})} = {f_{{idx\left(h\right)}}}\) by hUData;
formal
statement: ∀h ∈ p, ∀y ∈ X, ap (u h) y = basis_coordinate_function K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (idx h) y;
proof term: exact (andEL (∀h ∈ p, ∀y ∈ X, ap (u h) y = basis_coordinate_function K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (idx h) y) (matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j)) = exterior_product_linear_forms K addK mulK X p u x) hUData);
L250519L250524
have hDetEqExterior: \({\det({(\xi_{{\lambda h,\;idx\left(h\right)}_i,j})_{i,j}})} = {\left(\bigwedge_{i\in {p}}{u}_i\right)\left(x\right)}\) by hUData;
formal
statement: matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j)) = exterior_product_linear_forms K addK mulK X p u x;
proof term: exact (andER (∀h ∈ p, ∀y ∈ X, ap (u h) y = basis_coordinate_function K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (idx h) y) (matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j)) = exterior_product_linear_forms K addK mulK X p u x) hUData);
L250533
have hUHomomorphisms: \(\forall h\in p,\;{\lambda y,\;u\left(h,y\right)}:{X}\to {K}\);
proof from hidxIn, hBasis, hURelation, hXModule, hKModule (9 steps)
statement: ∀h ∈ p, module_homomorphism K addK mulK X addX smulX K addK mulK (λy ⇒ u h y);
L250536L250537
let h; assume hh;
L250538L250539
have hidxh: \({idx\left(h\right)} \in {n}\) by ap_Pi from hidxIn, hh;
formal
statement: idx h ∈ n;
proof term: exact (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ n) idx h hidxIn hh);
L250540L250545
have hCoordinateHom: \({f_{{idx\left(h\right)}}}:{X}\to {K}\) by basis_coordinate_function_homomorphism from hBasis, hidxh;
formal
statement: module_homomorphism K addK mulK X addX smulX K addK mulK (basis_coordinate_function K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (idx h));
proof term: exact (god1_basis_coordinate_function_homomorphism K addK mulK X addX smulX n a hBasis (idx h) hidxh);
L250547L250548
have hUMaps: \(\forall y\in X,\;{u\left(h,y\right)} \in {K}\) by substitution using module_homomorphism_maps_into from hURelation, hh, hCoordinateHom;
formal
statement: ∀y ∈ X, u h y ∈ K;
proof term: exact (λy hy ⇒ mem_eq_substL K (basis_coordinate_function K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (idx h) y) (u h y) (hURelation h hh y hy) (god1_module_homomorphism_maps_into K addK mulK X addX smulX K addK mulK (basis_coordinate_function K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (idx h)) hCoordinateHom y hy));
L250557
thus thesis by module_homomorphism_pointwise_transfer from hXModule, hKModule, hCoordinateHom, hUMaps, hURelation, hh;
formal
exact (god1_module_homomorphism_pointwise_transfer K addK mulK X addX smulX K addK mulK (basis_coordinate_function K addK mulK X addX smulX n a (idx h)) (λy ⇒ u h y) hXModule hKModule hCoordinateHom hUMaps (λy hy ⇒ hURelation h hh y hy));
end;
L250564L250568
have hExteriorAlternating: \({\mathsf{addK}}\in\operatorname{Alt}^{{p}}({X},{\mathsf{addX}})\) by h_s23_t9_example2_alternating_formal_call from hp, hPositive, hRing, hUHomomorphisms;
formal
statement: alternating_multilinear_mapping K addK mulK p X addX smulX K addK mulK (λz ⇒ exterior_product_linear_forms K addK mulK X p u z);
proof term: exact (h_s23_t9_example2_alternating_formal_call K addK mulK p hp X addX smulX u hPositive hRing hUHomomorphisms);
L250571L250574
have hExteriorZero: \({\left(\bigwedge_{i\in {p}}{u}_i\right)\left(x\right)} = {0_{{K}}}\) by hExteriorAlternating, hx, hRepeated;
formal
statement: exterior_product_linear_forms K addK mulK X p u x = ring_zero K addK;
proof term: exact ((andER (multilinear_mapping K addK mulK p (λi ⇒ X) (λi ⇒ addX) (λi ⇒ smulX) K addK mulK (λz ⇒ exterior_product_linear_forms K addK mulK X p u z)) (∀z ∈ Xp, (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ z i = z j) → exterior_product_linear_forms K addK mulK X p u z = module_zero K addK) hExteriorAlternating) x hx hRepeated);
L250584L250589
have hDetZero: \({\det({(\xi_{{\lambda h,\;idx\left(h\right)}_i,j})_{i,j}})} = {0_{{K}}}\) by transitivity from hDetEqExterior, hExteriorZero;
formal
statement: matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j)) = ring_zero K addK;
proof term: exact (eq_i_tra (matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j))) (exterior_product_linear_forms K addK mulK X p u x) (ring_zero K addK) hDetEqExterior hExteriorZero);
L250595L250596
have hBasisTuple: \({\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)} \in {{X}^{{p}}}\) by lam_Pi from hBasisMaps, hidxIn;
formal
statement: (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) ∈ Xp;
proof term: exact (lam_Pi p (λh ⇒ X) (λh ⇒ a (idx h)) (λh hh ⇒ hBasisMaps (idx h) (ap_Pi p (λq ⇒ n) idx h hidxIn hh)));
L250599L250600
have hCoefficientIn: \({f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)} \in {M}\) by multilinear_mapping_maps_into from hMultilinear, hBasisTuple;
formal
statement: f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) ∈ M;
proof term: exact (god1_multilinear_mapping_maps_into K addK mulK p (λh ⇒ X) (λh ⇒ addX) (λh ⇒ smulX) M addM smulM f hMultilinear (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)) hBasisTuple);
L250604
thus thesis by transitivity from hDetZero, hScalarZero, hCoefficientIn;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (smulM (matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) (smulM (ring_zero K addK) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) (module_zero M addM) (f_eq_i (λq ⇒ smulM q (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) (matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j))) (ring_zero K addK) hDetZero) (hScalarZero (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))) hCoefficientIn));
end;
L250619L250630
have hSumToZeroFamily: \({\sum_{i\in {\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\}}}{\lambda idx,\;\mathsf{smulM}\left(\det({(\xi_{{\lambda h,\;idx\left(h\right)}_i,j})_{i,j}}),f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)\right)}_i} = {\sum_{i\in {\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\}}}{\lambda \mathsf{\_}:set,\;0_{{M}}}_i}\) by module_finitely_supported_sum_congr_finite_index from hFiniteIncreasing, hTermZero;
formal
statement: module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (λidx ⇒ smulM (matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (λ_ : set ⇒ module_zero M addM);
proof term: exact (god1_module_finitely_supported_sum_congr_finite_index M addM {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} hFiniteIncreasing (λidx ⇒ smulM (matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h)))) (λ_ : set ⇒ module_zero M addM) hTermZero);
L250640
thus thesis by transitivity using module_finitely_supported_sum_constant_zero from hFormula, hSumToZeroFamily;
formal
exact (eq_i_tra (f x) (module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (λidx ⇒ smulM (matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))))) (module_zero M addM) hFormula (eq_i_tra (module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (λidx ⇒ smulM (matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))))) (module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (λ_ : set ⇒ module_zero M addM)) (module_zero M addM) hSumToZeroFamily (god1_module_finitely_supported_sum_constant_zero M addM {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx})));
end;
L250664
thus thesis by hMultilinear, hRepeatedVanish;
formal
exact (andI (multilinear_mapping K addK mulK p (λi ⇒ X) (λi ⇒ addX) (λi ⇒ smulX) M addM smulM f) (∀x ∈ Xp, (∃i j ∈ p, i ≠ j ∧ x i = x j) → f x = module_zero M addM) hMultilinear hRepeatedVanish);
end;

have h_s23_t9_equivalence: \({{\mathsf{addM}}\in\operatorname{Alt}^{{p}}({X},{\mathsf{addX}})} \leftrightarrow {c_{i_1\ldots i_p}=0,\ c_{i_\sigma}=\varepsilon(\sigma)c_i}\) by iffI from h_s23_t9_coefficient_conditions_necessary, h_s23_t9_alternating_conclusion;
formal
statement: alternating_multilinear_mapping K addK mulK p X addX smulX M addM smulM f ↔ alternating_basis_coefficient_conditions K addK mulK X addX smulX M addM smulM n p a f;
proof term: exact (iffI (alternating_multilinear_mapping K addK mulK p X addX smulX M addM smulM f) (alternating_basis_coefficient_conditions K addK mulK X addX smulX M addM smulM n p a f) h_s23_t9_coefficient_conditions_necessary h_s23_t9_alternating_conclusion);
L250684
thus thesis by h_s23_t9_equivalence, h_s23_t9_formula33;
formal
exact (andI (alternating_multilinear_mapping K addK mulK p X addX smulX M addM smulM f ↔ alternating_basis_coefficient_conditions K addK mulK X addX smulX M addM smulM n p a f) (alternating_basis_coefficient_conditions K addK mulK X addX smulX M addM smulM n p a f → ∀x ∈ Xp, f x = module_finitely_supported_sum M addM {idx ∈ np|strictly_increasing_index_tuple n p idx} (λidx ⇒ smulM (matrix_determinant K addK mulK p (selected_coordinate_matrix K addK mulK X addX smulX n p a (λh ⇒ idx h) (λj ⇒ x j))) (f (λh ∈ p ⇒ a (idx h))))) h_s23_t9_equivalence h_s23_t9_formula33);
7 source-level helpers folded
h_s23_t9_assume_coefficient_conditions: \(c_{i_1\ldots i_p}=0,\ c_{i_\sigma}=\varepsilon(\sigma)c_i \to \forall idx\in {n}^{{p}},\;\exists i,j\in p,\;{{i} \neq {j}} \land {{idx\left(i\right)} = {idx\left(j\right)}} \to {f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)} = {0_{{M}}}\) by calculation (unused helper);
h_s23_t9_inner_permutation_sum: \(\forall idx\in {n}^{{p}},\;\forall x\in {X}^{{p}},\;\exists \mathsf{scalar}\in K,\;{\mathsf{scalar}} = {\det({(\xi_{{\lambda h,\;idx\left(h\right)}_i,j})_{i,j}})}\) proof folded (unused helper);
h_s23_t9_coordinate_forms_are_linear: \(\forall i\in n,\;{f_{{i}}}:{X}\to {K}\) by basis_coordinate_function_homomorphism from hBasis (unused helper);
h_s23_t9_s21_example2_formal_call: \(\forall K0,\;\forall \mathsf{add0},\mathsf{mul0}:set \to set \to set,\;\forall p0\in \omega,\;\forall X0:set \to set,\;\forall \mathsf{addX0},\mathsf{smulX0}:set \to set \to set \to set,\;\forall u0:set \to set \to set,\;({K0},{\mathsf{add0}},{\mathsf{mul0}})\text{ is a commutative ring} \to \forall q\in p0,\;{u0\left(q\right)}:{X0\left(q\right)}\to {K0} \to {\lambda x0,\;\prod_{i\in {p0}}{\lambda q,\;u0\left(q,x0\left(q\right)\right)}_i}\in\mathscr L({X0};{K0})\) by s21_example2_product_of_linear_forms_is_multilinear (unused helper);
h_s23_t9_tensor_coordinate_value: \(\forall idx\in {n}^{{p}},\;\forall x\in {X}^{{p}},\;{\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;f_{{idx\left(h\right)}}}_i} = {\prod_{i\in {p}}{\lambda h,\;\left([{x\left(h\right)}]_{{a}}\right)\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)}_i}\) by eq_ref (unused helper);
h_s23_t9_section3_example2_formal_call: \(\forall K0,\;\forall \mathsf{add0},\mathsf{mul0}:set \to set \to set,\;\forall p0\in \omega,\;\forall X0,\;\forall \mathsf{addX0},\mathsf{smulX0}:set \to set \to set,\;\forall u0:set \to set,\;{0} \in {p0} \to ({K0},{\mathsf{add0}},{\mathsf{mul0}})\text{ is a commutative ring} \to \forall i\in p0,\;{\lambda x0,\;u0\left(i,x0\right)}:{X0}\to {K0} \to {\mathsf{add0}}\in\operatorname{Alt}^{{p0}}({X0},{\mathsf{addX0}})\) by exterior_product_of_linear_forms_is_alternating (unused helper);
h_s23_t9_exterior_expansion: \(c_{i_1\ldots i_p}=0,\ c_{i_\sigma}=\varepsilon(\sigma)c_i \to \forall x\in {X}^{{p}},\;{f\left(x\right)} = {\sum_{i\in {\left\{idx\in {n}^{{p}}\mid {p}_1<\cdots<{p}_p\right\}}}{\lambda idx,\;\mathsf{smulM}\left(\det({(\xi_{{\lambda h,\;idx\left(h\right)}_i,j})_{i,j}}),f\left(\lambda h\in p,\;a\left(idx\left(h\right)\right)\right)\right)}_i}\) by h_s23_t9_formula33 (unused helper);
∎
